question: What event triggered violent protests in Bucharest, Romania, on Sunday, and what prominent visual element characterized these protests?
answer: The violent protests were triggered by Romania's ban on far-right pro-Russian politician Colleen Jesu from standing in the May presidential election rerun. A prominent visual element was a large fire burning in the middle of the protest scene, surrounded by protesters and police officers in riot gear.

video: A large group of police officers in riot gear labeled "JANDARMERIA" form a line facing a crowd of protesters at night, with some holding Romanian flags.
A fire burns brightly in the middle of the protest scene, surrounded by people and police.
text: Protests turned violent in Bucharest, Romania, on Sunday after the country banned far-right pro-Russian politician Colleen Jesu from standing in the May presidential election rerun.
